scope: RaptorQ Forward Error Correction Scheme for Object Delivery

requirement_categories.parameter_derivation: Parameter calculation and validation (K, K', systematic index, etc.)
requirement_categories.encoding_process: Source symbol encoding and systematic symbol generation
requirement_categories.repair_symbols: Repair symbol generation and ESI assignment
requirement_categories.decoding_process: Constraint matrix construction and Gaussian elimination
requirement_categories.tuple_generation: Tuple calculation for systematic and repair symbols

testability_categories.unit_testable: Can be tested in isolation with direct assertions
testability_categories.integration_testable: Requires end-to-end testing with multiple components
testability_categories.differential_testable: Best tested by comparison with reference implementation
testability_categories.manual_verification: Requires human inspection or complex validation setup

clauses.description: The object MUST be partitioned into Z >= 1 source blocks
clauses.requirement_text: The object MUST be partitioned into Z >= 1 source blocks
clauses.test_strategy: Verify object partitioning logic produces correct number of source blocks
clauses.notes: Basic partitioning implemented, edge cases need verification

clauses.description: Each source block MUST have K source symbols where K is derived from the object size
clauses.requirement_text: Each source block MUST have K source symbols where K is derived from the object size and other parameters according to Section 4.1.2
clauses.test_strategy: Test K derivation for various object sizes and validate against RFC formulas

clauses.description: Symbol size T MUST be the same for all symbols in the source block
clauses.requirement_text: The symbol size T MUST be the same for all symbols in the source block
clauses.test_strategy: Verify all symbols in a source block have identical size T
clauses.notes: Symbol size consistency is enforced but needs comprehensive testing

clauses.description: Systematic symbols MUST be the source symbols themselves, in order
clauses.requirement_text: The first K encoding symbols MUST be the K source symbols of the source block, in order
clauses.test_strategy: Verify first K encoding symbols exactly match source symbols
clauses.notes: Systematic encoding implemented, needs comprehensive validation

clauses.description: Repair symbols MUST be computed using the specified algorithm
clauses.requirement_text: Repair symbols with ESI X >= K MUST be computed as the exclusive-or of a set of source symbols determined by the algorithm in Section 5.3.5
clauses.test_strategy: Compare repair symbol generation with reference implementation
clauses.notes: Repair symbols implemented but no conformance validation

clauses.description: Encoding Symbol ID assignment SHOULD follow systematic ordering
clauses.requirement_text: ESIs SHOULD be assigned consecutively starting from 0 for systematic symbols
clauses.test_strategy: Property test: verify ESI assignment follows systematic ordering

clauses.description: Decoder MUST construct constraint matrix from received symbols
clauses.requirement_text: The decoder MUST construct a constraint matrix from the received encoding symbols
clauses.test_strategy: Verify constraint matrix construction matches RFC specification
clauses.notes: Matrix construction implemented but conformance needs validation

clauses.description: Gaussian elimination MUST use specified algorithm
clauses.requirement_text: Gaussian elimination MUST proceed according to the algorithm specified in Section 5.4
clauses.test_strategy: Compare elimination steps with reference implementation
clauses.notes: Gaussian elimination algorithm needs systematic validation

clauses.description: Successful decoding MUST recover original source block
clauses.requirement_text: If decoding is successful, the decoder MUST recover the original source block exactly
clauses.test_strategy: End-to-end test: encode then decode, verify byte-exact recovery
clauses.notes: Round-trip testing exists but needs comprehensive coverage

clauses.description: Systematic index MUST be calculated according to Table 2
clauses.requirement_text: For K source symbols, the systematic index J(K) MUST be calculated according to the systematic index table in Table 2
clauses.test_strategy: Test systematic index calculation against RFC Table 2
clauses.notes: Systematic index calculation needs validation against RFC table

clauses.description: Parameters K' MUST be calculated from K and systematic index
clauses.requirement_text: K' = K + S + H where S and H are derived from the systematic index J(K)
clauses.test_strategy: Verify K' calculation for various K values
clauses.notes: K' derivation implemented but needs systematic testing

clauses.description: Parameters P1 MUST be smallest prime >= K'
clauses.requirement_text: P1 MUST be the smallest prime number that is greater than or equal to K'
clauses.test_strategy: Test P1 calculation for edge cases and validate primality
clauses.notes: Prime calculation implemented but edge cases need testing

clauses.description: Tuple generation MUST use specified PRNG algorithm
clauses.requirement_text: Tuples (d, a, b) for systematic symbols MUST be generated using the algorithm in Section 5.3.5.1
clauses.test_strategy: Compare tuple generation with reference implementation
clauses.notes: Tuple generation algorithm needs conformance validation

clauses.description: Repair symbol tuples MUST use different algorithm
clauses.requirement_text: Tuples (d1, a1, b1) for repair symbols MUST be generated using the algorithm in Section 5.3.5.2
clauses.test_strategy: Compare repair tuple generation with reference implementation

clauses.description: Matrix MUST have specific structure with LDPC, Half, and LT symbols
clauses.requirement_text: The constraint matrix MUST consist of three types of equations: LDPC constraint equations, Half symbol equations, and LT constraint equations
clauses.test_strategy: Verify matrix structure matches RFC specification exactly
clauses.notes: Matrix structure implemented but needs structural validation

clauses.description: Lookup tables V0 and V1 MUST match RFC values exactly
clauses.requirement_text: The lookup tables V0 and V1 defined in Section 5.5 MUST be used exactly as specified
clauses.test_strategy: Validate V0 and V1 tables byte-for-byte against RFC
clauses.notes: Lookup tables implemented, need to verify against RFC values
